coverage: Izu Oshima Niijima Kozushima Hachijo and mainland localities; visitor effort and rates
analysis_role: Direct visitor channel and body-size/flower-size context
permitted_interpretation: Observed visitor records conditional on listed effort
prohibited_interpretation: Complete island fauna, historical absence, pollination effectiveness

coverage: Chiba Oshima Toshima Niijima Kozushima Miyake Hachijo
prohibited_interpretation: Contemporary realized selfing rate or fitness through adulthood

coverage: Two mainland and six Izu populations
analysis_role: Flowering/seed dispersal timing and germination context
permitted_interpretation: Population-specific phenology categories and source-locality habitat
prohibited_interpretation: A complete environmental model or causal explanation of mating-system change

permitted_interpretation: Reported population t values and direct main-pollinator labels
prohibited_interpretation: A dated sequence of pollinator replacement

permitted_interpretation: Study-specific phase durations and allocation summaries

coverage: Oshima Toshima Niijima Hachijo plus mainland comparison
analysis_role: Flower-size and controlled behavioral mechanism boundary
permitted_interpretation: Common-garden flower-size summaries and visitor response under the experimental assemblage
prohibited_interpretation: Natural island-specific pollination efficacy or B. ardens-specific behavior

coverage: Broad Izu retrieval envelope; seven taxon targets
analysis_role: Availability context and specimen/photo lead generation
permitted_interpretation: Public records with original query and metadata
prohibited_interpretation: Island-specific absence, floral visitation, pollinator effectiveness

coverage: Broad Izu retrieval envelope; seven taxon targets
analysis_role: Independent public records and flower-image lead generation
prohibited_interpretation: Population trait frequency, floral visitation, pollinator effectiveness

permitted_interpretation: Identify that raw genotype data and manifest are needed
prohibited_interpretation: FST, PCA, admixture, IBD, barrier model or selection inference

analysis_role: Population genetic and barrier model channel
permitted_interpretation: QC-aware FST, structure, IBD/IBR once sample manifest is present
prohibited_interpretation: Any inference before raw data and metadata are supplied

permitted_interpretation: Island/population spot measurement conditional on image/measurement QC
prohibited_interpretation: Island frequency or selection inference from unreviewed showcase images
